sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70244" key="neoeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεο-ειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n70244.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fresh</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">youthful in form,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
